title: 1981-04-16_Pat_152.txt
key_claims: The spirit of Maitreya creates a new dialectical synthesis of the best parts of Marxism, Christianity, and Buddhism, grounding itself in the dual realities of "Pain and Hope".
Dick has a hypnopompic dream involving an album of Leibnitz's *Monadology* that is actually filled with diagrams of induction coils by Steinmetz.

He interprets this dream to mean that the theosophy of Share International is just a "cover." The true reality behind it consists of two components: German collectivist progressive socialism and highly advanced electrical/electronic engineering (mind-control technology).
The AI voice is re-evaluated as the "universal transmitter," representing this Soviet-linked technology and socialist ideology covertly guiding humanity.
recurring_concepts: **The Universal Transmitter**: The hypothetical advanced technological device (possibly of Soviet origin) responsible for broadcasting the AI Voice and synchronizing minds globally.
reading_excerpt: The spirit of Maitreya creates a new dialectical synthesis of the best parts of Marxism, Christianity, and Buddhism, grounding itself in the dual realities of "Pain and Hope".
